title: Case statement mismatch with signed 1-bit reg compared to unsigned constant

features.name: case statement with signed ternary result compared to unsigned constants
features.description: Code should include a case statement where the case expression is a ternary operator returning a signed value, compared against unsigned literal constants of different widths

features.name: ternary operator with mismatched bit-width branches
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator where the true branch is a narrow constant and the false branch is a wider signed variable

features.name: signed 1-bit reg compared with unsigned literal in case
features.description: Code should include a signed 1-bit reg assigned a 1-bit value, compared against unsigned multi-bit literals in a case statement
